title: 假設語氣（與過去相反）If + S + had p.p....

formulas.formula: If + S + had p.p., S + would/could/might + have p.p.
formulas.zh: 如果（過去）...，（過去）就會/能/可能...

formulas.formula: Had S + p.p., S + would/could/might + have p.p.
formulas.zh: 倒裝形式：若省略 if，had 須前置於主詞

explanation: 第三條件句用於表達與過去事實相反的假設。if 子句使用過去完成式（had + p.p.），表示過去未曾發生的事；主句用 would/could/might + have + p.p.，表示過去本可能發生但未發生的結果。若省略 if，需使用倒裝語序（Had + S）。此句型常與第二條件句混合，表達多層次的假設情境。注意：不可使用 will have 或 can have 在主句中。

examples.eng: If I had studied harder, I would have passed the exam.
examples.chi: 如果我當時用功讀書，我就會通過考試了。

examples.eng: Had she known the truth earlier, she could have made a better decision.
examples.chi: 要是她早知道真相，她本來可以做出更好的決定。

examples.eng: If we hadn't missed the flight, we might have arrived on time.
examples.chi: 如果我們沒有錯過班機，我們可能已經準時到達了。

examples.eng: Had you listened to my advice, you wouldn't have regretted it now.
examples.chi: 要是你當時聽我的建議，你現在就不會後悔了。

extension.tip: 判斷第三條件句的關鍵：時間詞為過去（yesterday、at that time、then）且事實未發生。常見錯誤是在主句用 will have（應用 would have）或在 if 子句用 would have（應用 had p.p.）。倒裝形式 Had S 後接 p.p.，主句結構不變。

examples.test: If I would have known → If I had known
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤：if 子句不可用 would have，只能用 had p.p.

examples.test: If you had told me, I will help you → If you had told me, I would have helped you
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤：主句須用過去時態 would have，不能用 will

examples.test: Had I known earlier, I could have changed my plan.
examples.result: ✓ 正確：倒裝形式，Had + S + p.p. 表省略 if

extension.note: 三條件句口訣：『過過會』— if 子句用過去完成，主句用 would/could/might + have。

parts: the warning, he would have avoided the accident.
exercises.sentence: If he had heeded the warning, he would have avoided the accident.
exercises.translation: 如果他當時留意警告，他就會避免那場事故了。

parts: the project been completed on time, the company wouldn't have lost that contract.
exercises.sentence: Had the project been completed on time, the company wouldn't have lost that contract.
exercises.translation: 要是那個項目按時完成，公司就不會失去那份合約了。

parts: If I had taken your advice, I
exercises.sentence: If I had taken your advice, I wouldn't have made such a costly mistake.
exercises.translation: 如果我當時採納你的建議，我就不會犯這麼昂貴的錯誤了。

parts: that chance if she had been more confident back then.
exercises.sentence: She could have seized that chance if she had been more confident back then.
exercises.translation: 如果她當時更有自信，她本來可以抓住那個機會的。

vocab_table.zh: 本來可以做；當時能夠做
